dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, gain 1000 Power for 10 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Fiend Hunter
dbEquipBonuses.description: +1% Damage against Demons, Devils, and Fiends

dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Accuracy
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 500 Accuracy for each enemy you are engaged in battle with. (Max of 15 targets)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Surge of Lethality
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use an at-will power, you have a 1.5% chance to gain 9.5% Critical Severity for 5 seconds. This does not stack (5 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Ruthless Momentum
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use an at-will power, you have a 30% chance to gain +7% Critical Severity for 6 seconds. Re-applying the effect will refresh it's duration.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Reprisal Reflex
dbEquipBonuses.description: On Crit hit on you: reflect 10% MaxHP + 0.5% Awareness 10s (10s cd)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, gain 1000 Power for 10 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Executioner's Ferocity
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, your Critical Severity increases by 5% for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Savagery
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Critical Strike is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Critical Avoidance is increased by 10,000.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 250 Power for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Haste
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Recharge Speed for each enemy you are engaged in battle within 100'. Max 10 Stacks: 10% Recharge Speed.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Challenger's Alacrity
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Recharge Speed is increased by 0.6% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 3% Recharge Speed.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Sudden Intuition
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Awareness and Deflect Severity by 7.5% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Untamed Ferocity
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your powers, you have a 10% chance to gain 5% Critical Severity for 10 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Sudden Intuition
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Awareness and Deflect Severity by 7% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Zeal
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 15 Action Points. Can only occur once every 5 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Critical Force
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to deal 150 magnitude damage around you. This effect may only occur once every 15 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Critical Force
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to deal 150 magnitude damage around you. This effect may only occur once every 15 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Sudden Intuition
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Awareness and Deflect Severity by 7.5% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Tactical Insight
dbEquipBonuses.description: Per 6s in combat: +0.4% Awareness, +0.1% Power to allies in 20'. Max 8 (3.2% / 0.8% per ally)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 250 Power for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, gain 1000 Power for 10 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Reptilial Reflex
dbEquipBonuses.description: On Critical Strike against you, reflect 10% of your Maximum Hit Points as damage and gain +7.5% Awareness for 10 seconds. (20 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Consuming Rage
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Critical Severity is increased by 1.8% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 9% Critical Severity
